titles.text: BS The Legend of Zelda "MottZilla Patch"

descriptions.text: BS Legend of Zelda "MottZilla Patch" is a ROM hack/mod for BS Zelda no Densetsu Map 2. It makes the game able to be played on a real SNES, making it a single game with both BS Zelda games (Maps 1 and 2), with a time limit of 50 minutes per week (weeks on the Satellaview worked like time-limited episodes).
